channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Pro-Palestine legal aid requests stay high in 2025 amid US campus pressure
item.description: Pro-Palestine legal aid requests remained high in 2025 amid US campus pressure. Legal aid group says the rate of requests shows pro-Palestine advocacy persists despite Trump administration's tactics. Pro-Palestine legal aid requests stay high in 2025 amid US campus pressure.

item.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Extends Cease-Fire With Iran
item.description: Trump extended a cease-fire with Iran at Pakistan's request. The pause in hostilities had been set to expire within hours. The president said Pakistan, which is trying to mediate an end to the war, requested he hold off any attacks.

item.title: Nearly 8,000 people died or disappeared on migration routes in 2025: IOM
item.description: Nearly 8,000 people died or disappeared on migration routes in 2025. More than four in every 10 deaths and disappearances occurred on sea routes to Europe, UN agency says.

item.title: US issues more Iran sanctions on eve of possible talks in Pakistan
item.description: The US issued sanctions on 14 Iranian individuals and entities. The Trump administration targets 14 individuals and entities over alleged links to Iran's arms industry. US issues more Iran sanctions on eve of possible talks in Pakistan.

item.title: Trump Is Said to Be in Talks to Send Afghans Who Aided U.S. Forces to Congo
item.description: Trump is in talks to send Afghans who aided US forces to the Democratic Republic of Congo. A U. S. aid worker said that the Afghans, who were evacuated to Qatar, would face a choice between moving to the Democratic Republic of Congo and living under the Taliban.

item.title: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire, Hormuz Blockade To Continue
item.description: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire until a proposal is submitted. The Hormuz blockade will continue. Trump says extending ceasefire until Iranian proposal is submitted and discussions are concluded. Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire, Hormuz Blockade To Continue.

item.title: EU eyes options as Iran conflict threatens jet fuel shortages
item.description: Europe faces jet fuel shortages due to the Hormuz blockade. Imports are heavily relied upon. The blockade of the Strait of Hormuz is causing concern in Europe, which relies heavily on imported jet fuel.

item.title: Sudan refugees returning home face new ‘struggle for survival’: UN
item.description: Sudanese returnees face damaged homes and limited access to water and healthcare. Returnees find chronic need for investment with homes, water supplies, health provision, electricity 'heavily damaged'. Sudan refugees returning home face new ‘struggle for survival’: UN.

item.title: Trump says he will extend ceasefire with Iran until negotiations conclude
item.description: US-Iran peace talks are uncertain as the ceasefire deadline approaches. Live updates: Uncertainty swirls around US-Iran peace talks as ceasefire deadline looms CNN. Live updates: Trump says he will extend ceasefire with Iran until negotiations conclude CNN.

item.title: Trump announces Iran ceasefire extension but says blockade remains
item.description: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire until leaders propose a unified plan to end the war. US president says attacks will be held off until Iranian leaders 'come up with a unified proposal' to end war.

item.title: Trump extends ceasefire as uncertainty over U.S.-Iran peace talks remains
item.description: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire amid uncertainty over US-Iran peace talks. Live Updates: Trump extends ceasefire as uncertainty over U. S.-Iran peace talks remains CBS News.

item.title: Germany, Italy block bid to suspend EU-Israel trade agreement
item.description: Germany and Italy blocked the EU from suspending its association agreement with Israel. The move halted a proposed suspension. Germany and Italy have blocked the European Union from suspending the bloc’s association agreement with Israel.

item.title: Trump extends ceasefire in Iran, citing 'seriously fractured' Iranian government
item.description: Trump extended a ceasefire in Iran citing a fractured government. The extension was announced by Trump. Trump extends ceasefire in Iran, citing 'seriously fractured' Iranian government CNBC.

item.title: U.S. Turns Up Pressure on Iraq to Distance Itself From Iran
item.description: The US is pressuring Iraq to dismantle Iran-backed militias. These militias have attacked Americans and US sites. Washington is demanding that the Baghdad government dismantle Iran-backed Iraqi militias that have been attacking Americans and U. S.

item.title: Iran threatens To End Gulf Nations' Oil Production As Truce Deadline Nears
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guards threatened to end Gulf nations' oil production. The threat was made as a truce deadline nears. Iran's Revolutionary Guards on Tuesday threatened to end oil production in the Middle East if the Islamic republic faced attacks launched from its Gulf neighbours' territory.

item.title: Trump suggests he won’t end ceasefire with Iran even if talks are productive
item.description: Trump suggested he won't end the ceasefire with Iran. This is even if talks with Iran are productive. Iran war live updates: Trump suggests he won’t end ceasefire with Iran even if talks are productive MS NOW.

item.title: Rape retrial hears Weinstein 'preyed' on aspiring US actress
item.description: Prosecutors in the New York retrial of Harvey Weinstein claim he preyed upon a young actress. The 2013 rape case against the former US filmmaker is being retried, with prosecutors presenting their case to the jury.

item.title: US-Iran Talks Are In Doubt As Ceasefire Nears An End
item.description: The US-Iran ceasefire is set to expire, casting doubt on ongoing talks. The ceasefire was established after the US-Iran war broke out on February 28, but its terms are now under review.

item.title: Two Palestinians Killed in Israeli Shooting Near West Bank School
item.description: Two Palestinians, including a child, were killed in an Israeli shooting near a West Bank school. The incident occurred in Al Mughayir, where clashes between Israeli settlers and locals have increased in recent times.

item.title: 2 Americans Killed in Mexico Crash Were C.I.A. Members
item.description: Two CIA members were killed in a vehicle crash in Mexico's Chihuahua state. The Americans died on Sunday while returning from a counter-cartel operation led by Mexico's armed forces. The two Americans were killed on Sunday when their vehicle crashed while returning from a counter-cartel operation led by Mexico’s armed forces in the state of Chihuahua.
